message:
feat(vendored/mux_pool): tick 195 retry-backoff sleep cx-threaded (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues the ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-threading sweep. The MuxPool retry
backoff at execute_with_recovery used
`cx::with_cx_async(cx, |_| sleep(delay))`, which explicitly discards
cx via `|_|` and then calls the ambient `sleep()`. The ambient path
falls back to `Cx::current()` thread-local lookup, so the backoff
timer ended up bound to whatever thread-local cx happened to be
installed rather than the caller's explicit cx. Under LabRuntime
virtual time or when the pool runs under a different cx than the
caller, retry delays could be observed on the wrong clock.

Now routes through `runtime_compat::sleep_with_cx(cx, delay)` so the
backoff timer is bound to the caller's explicit cx, matching the
pattern used across the rest of the cx-first sweep.

- crates/frankenterm-core/src/vendored/mux_pool.rs: retry-backoff
  sleep now uses sleep_with_cx; inline comment documents the fix and
  references tick 195

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
